DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL(ROLLUPGROUP('product'[Color], 'date'[Year]), "IsGrandTotalRowTotal"),
			"Order_Detail_Count", 'orderrows'[Order Detail Count],
			"Sales", 'orderrows'[Sales]
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(502, __DS0Core, [IsGrandTotalRowTotal], 0, 'product'[Color], 1, 'date'[Year], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[IsGrandTotalRowTotal] DESC, 'product'[Color], 'date'[Year]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL('store'[State], "IsGrandTotalRowTotal"),
			"Order_Count", 'orders'[Order Count],
			"Order_Detail_Count", 'orderrows'[Order Detail Count]
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(502, __DS0Core, [IsGrandTotalRowTotal], 0, 'store'[State], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[IsGrandTotalRowTotal] DESC, 'store'[State]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL('orders'[StoreKey], "IsGrandTotalRowTotal"),
			"Order_Detail_Count", 'orderrows'[Order Detail Count]
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(502, __DS0Core, [IsGrandTotalRowTotal], 0, 'orders'[StoreKey], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[IsGrandTotalRowTotal] DESC, 'orders'[StoreKey]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL('product'[Color], "IsGrandTotalRowTotal"),
			"SumYear", CALCULATE(SUM('date'[Year])),
			"Order_Detail_Count", 'orderrows'[Order Detail Count],
			"Order_Count", 'orders'[Order Count]
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(502, __DS0Core, [IsGrandTotalRowTotal], 0, [SumYear], 0, 'product'[Color], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[IsGrandTotalRowTotal] DESC, [SumYear] DESC, 'product'[Color]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL('product'[Color], "IsGrandTotalRowTotal"),
			"SumYear", CALCULATE(SUM('date'[Year])),
